nature_and_landscape.title: The Cosmic Lighthouse
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A majestic lighthouse standing on a small planetoid, projecting a beam of swirling galaxies into the deep space sky. The sea below is made of stardust.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Cloud Shepherd
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A giant, gentle figure made of cotton clouds, walking across a rolling green landscape, guiding a flock of tiny, glowing sheep (which are actually stars).

nature_and_landscape.title: The Dessert Desert
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A vast desert where sand dunes are actually mounds of colored sugar, and giant lollipops and candy canes grow like cacti. A melting ice cream cone sun is in the sky.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Jellyfish Forest
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A dense forest where the trees have glowing, translucent jellyfish caps for leaves. Tiny, miniature whales are swimming between the branches.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Crystal Waterfall
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A cascading waterfall where the water has solidified into an infinite stream of sparkling, multifaceted crystals. A rainbow is refracted through it, forming a bridge.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Season-Spilling Tree
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A giant ancient tree. From one branch, spring flowers bloom; from another, summer sunbeams fall; a third sheds autumn leaves; and the fourth is covered in winter snow.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Mirror Lake
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A perfectly still lake that reflects not the forest surrounding it, but a vibrant, bustling city from a different dimension.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Piano Bridge
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A suspension bridge made entirely of white and black piano keys, spanning a chasm. Miniature musical notes are floating along the cables.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Sky-Whale Ocean
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A colossal whale, its skin depicting an entire deep-sea ecosystem, breaching through a sea of swirling clouds.

nature_and_landscape.title: The Clockwork Garden
nature_and_landscape.prompt: A botanical garden where flowers have gears for petals, vines are made of copper wires, and a grandfather clock functions as the central tree.

items_and_machines.title: The Melting Timepiece
items_and_machines.prompt: A vintage pocket watch melting like candle wax over the edge of a cosmic bookshelf, dripping time.

items_and_machines.title: The Book of Doors
items_and_machines.prompt: An ancient, open book where each page is a tiny, miniature door leading to a different world (a jungle, a city, a desert).

items_and_machines.title: The Steam-Powered Dragon
items_and_machines.prompt: A mechanical dragon made of copper, brass, and gears, sitting atop a pile of antique treasures, with steam rising from its nostrils.

items_and_machines.title: The Camera-Eyed Owl
items_and_machines.prompt: A wise owl with antique camera lenses for eyes, its feathers made of film strips, perched on a tripod in a mystical library.

items_and_machines.title: The Dream-Catching Net
items_and_machines.prompt: A delicate, glowing dreamcatcher net, made of starlight filaments, with tiny captured scenes (a hot air balloon, a ship) hanging from it.

items_and_machines.title: The Teacup Sea
items_and_machines.prompt: A vintage ceramic teacup overflowing with a perfect, miniature stormy ocean. A tiny paper boat is navigating the waves.

items_and_machines.title: The Telephone Booth Portal
items_and_machines.prompt: A red telephone booth sitting alone in a deep forest. The door is slightly ajar, revealing a swirling vortex of neon lights inside.

items_and_machines.title: The Umbrella City
items_and_machines.prompt: An open umbrella, held by an unseen hand, whose canopy is actually a detailed, bustling miniature cityscape.

items_and_machines.title: The Mechanical Heart
items_and_machines.prompt: A highly intricate mechanical heart made of gold, glass, and jewels, with visible gears turning and tiny, glowing energy tubes.

items_and_machines.title: The Galaxy-Spilling Jar
items_and_machines.prompt: A glass mason jar tipped over, spilling a colorful galaxy of stars, nebulae, and small planets onto a dark, velvet surface.

characters_and_figures.title: The Star-Thread Seamstress
characters_and_figures.prompt: A woman with a face of stars, using a golden needle to sew together a tapestry made of cosmic dust and fabric.

characters_and_figures.title: The Masked Violinist
characters_and_figures.prompt: A musician wearing an elaborate, theatrical mask, playing a violin. Instead of notes, tiny glowing butterflies are emerging from the f-holes.

characters_and_figures.title: The Balloon-Headed Philosopher
characters_and_figures.prompt: A thinker whose head is a giant, colorful cluster of helium balloons, floating slightly above their body, while they are reading a book.

characters_and_figures.title: The Tree-Spirit Guardian
characters_and_figures.prompt: A forest protector made of ancient wood and moss, its antlers holding a miniature, glowing ecosystem of birds and flowers.

characters_and_figures.title: The Hourglass-Heart Traveler
characters_and_figures.prompt: A vagabond whose chest is a large hourglass, with sand visibly flowing through it, carrying a satchel overflowing with world maps.

characters_and_figures.title: The Key-Keeper Monk
characters_and_figures.prompt: An old monk whose robes are made of thousands of different keys, walking down an endless hallway of doors.

characters_and_figures.title: The Cloud-Knitting Grandparent
characters_and_figures.prompt: An elderly figure sitting on a giant cloud, using massive knitting needles to create a blanket made of fluffy cirrus clouds.

characters_and_figures.title: The Navigator of the Sky
characters_and_figures.prompt: A sailor standing on the deck of a ship. Instead of sails, the ship is pulled by a giant flock of colorful hot air balloons.

characters_and_figures.title: The Jester of Worlds
characters_and_figures.prompt: A performer juggling multiple colorful, glowing globes, each globe showing a different habitable planet.

characters_and_figures.title: The Paper-Origami Samurai
characters_and_figures.prompt: A stoic warrior made entirely of intricate white origami paper, standing under a cherry blossom tree shedding pink paper petals.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Vertical City
buildings_and_structures.prompt: A city built not horizontally, but vertically, spiraling around a massive central column that reaches up into the stratosphere.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Treehouse Mansion
buildings_and_structures.prompt: An elaborate Victorian-style mansion built high within the branches of a colossal oak tree, connected by multiple rope bridges.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Underwater Cathedral
buildings_and_structures.prompt: An ancient, grand cathedral submerged in a deep ocean, with rays of blue light filtering through the stained glass windows, surrounded by fish.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Sandcastle Metropolis
buildings_and_structures.prompt: An impossibly detailed sandcastle built on a beach, complete with tiny glass windows and functional drawbridges.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Floating Island Library
buildings_and_structures.prompt: An island made of overgrown ruins and massive stone books, floating gently in the sky, accessible only by airship.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Gear-Turning Clocktower
buildings_and_structures.prompt: A massive clocktower where the entire structure is a single, exposed mechanical entity, with visible, massive turning gears.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Lighthouse of Dreams
buildings_and_structures.prompt: A lighthouse built on a small, isolated cloud, projecting beams of colorful dreams onto the sleeping city below.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Bridge of Keys
buildings_and_structures.prompt: A bridge made entirely of mismatched vintage keys, spanning a deep canyon.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Lantern-Lit Village
buildings_and_structures.prompt: A quaint village where the houses are built inside giant, hanging paper lanterns, suspended from invisible threads in a dark sky.

buildings_and_structures.title: The Infinite Stairs
buildings_and_structures.prompt: A winding stone staircase that spirals endlessly upwards into a golden light, with no visible end.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Sea of Unwritten Letters
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A vast ocean made of crumpled paper and envelopes. A lighthouse in the distance is projecting blank light.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Tangled Path of Memories
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A labyrinth made of multicolored ribbons and strings, with small, glowing orbs (representing memories) hanging from them.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Balance of Elements
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: An antique scale where one side holds a burning sun and the other a giant drop of water, perfectly balanced.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Shattered Symmetry
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A beautiful, symmetrical portrait (e.g., a face) that is cracked like a mirror, with each piece reflecting a slightly different reality.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Prism of Emotions
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A diamond prism that is refracting a single beam of light into a spectrum of different, vibrant colors, each color with a different emoji-like face in it.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Whispering Shadows
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: Shadows of people projected onto a wall, but the shadows themselves are independent entities, discussing things and interacting.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Harvest of Stars
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A farmer in a field of tall grass, using a scythe to harvest tiny, glowing stars that are scattered on the ground.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Loom of Time
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: An ancient loom where the fabric being woven is a visual timeline of historical events (pyramids, castles, spaceships).

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Echo Chamber
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A surreal room filled with floating, open mouths, each mouth projecting a different word in glowing, smoky text.

abstract_and_concepts.title: The Threshold of Worlds
abstract_and_concepts.prompt: A simple door frame standing alone in a desert, showing a lush, green forest on the other side.
